items.axon_justification: PREREGISTRATION.md frozen before data collection (2026-02-12). Includes hypotheses, conditions, metrics, sample sizes, and analysis plan.
items.aisp_justification: No pre-registration exists. No analysis plan documented.
items.aisp_evidence: Repository contains zero experimental methodology files.

items.axon_justification: 5 controlled baselines: free English, structured English, instruction-matched English, JSON function calling, FIPA-ACL.
items.aisp_justification: Comparison only to undefined 'traditional prose'. No controlled baselines, no baseline definition.
items.aisp_evidence: README.md comparison table references 'Traditional Approach' without specification.

items.axon_justification: FAIRNESS.md specifies judges don't see condition labels. Outputs presented without format identification.
items.aisp_justification: No evaluation procedure exists to blind. All 'evidence' is self-reported by the project author.
items.aisp_evidence: evidence/ directory contains no evaluation methodology.

items.axon_justification: 3 models tested: Claude Haiku, Claude Sonnet, Codex (gpt-5.3-codex). Results reported per model and aggregated.
items.aisp_justification: No experiments conducted with any model. Claims do not reference specific model evaluations.

items.axon_justification: 3 runs per cell in Exp 1 (486 total = 6 conditions × 3 models × 9 tasks × 3 runs). Exp 0 replicated 3 times.
Welch's t-test, Holm-Bonferroni correction for 5 pairwise comparisons, Cohen's d effect sizes, block bootstrap CIs, mixed-effects models.
items.aisp_justification: No statistical analysis. The '97x' claim is a mathematical derivation from assumed (not measured) per-step accuracy rates.

items.axon_justification: Structured Claude↔Codex adversarial debates. ~100 critique points raised, ~85% resolved. Self-review ablation tracked. Debate transcripts preserved.
items.axon_evidence: debate/ directory contains 15+ debate summaries with structured metadata.
items.aisp_justification: No review process documented. Single contributor, no code review, no external critique.
items.aisp_evidence: Repository has 7 commits by 1 contributor, 0 merged PRs.

items.axon_justification: FAIRNESS.md: symmetric prompt budgets (8:1 max ratio), metadata equivalence, 3-judge panel, human validation subset, blinding protocol.
items.aisp_justification: No fairness considerations documented. Comparison to undefined baseline with no attempt to control for confounds.

items.axon_justification: Primary claim: '~32% better tok/unit vs JSON FC' with Cohen's d=-0.43, 95% bootstrap CI [-0.73, -0.13]. All pairwise comparisons include CIs.
items.aisp_justification: Claims are unquantified assertions ('97x improvement') derived from assumed base rates. No confidence intervals, no effect sizes, no sample sizes.
items.aisp_evidence: README.md, evidence/README.md — no statistical measures reported.

items.axon_justification: PREREGISTRATION.md includes explicit commitment: 'If AXON does not outperform baselines, results will be reported as-is.'
items.aisp_justification: No experimental framework exists to produce null results. Evidence directory contains placeholder data and unsupported claims.
items.aisp_evidence: evidence/tic-tac-toe/analysis.md: 'Status: Placeholder — Full analysis data coming soon'
